endpoints.name: PUT /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/certificates/{certificateName}
endpoints.description: Uploads a certificate for a resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CERTIFICATENAME}} with a real certificatename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/registeredIdentities/{identityName}
endpoints.description: Unregisters the given container from your Recovery Services vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{IDENTITYNAME}} with a real identityname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.
